query:
SELECT
                    attachment_id AS "attachment_id: _",
                    remote_attachment_id AS "remote_attachment_id: _",
                    chat_id AS "chat_id: _",
                    message_id AS "message_id: _",
                    content_type AS "content_type: _",
                    status AS "status: _",
                    created_at AS "created_at: _"
                FROM attachment
                WHERE attachment_id = ?
